Description: "Add draftSettings and draftContent fields to Theme and Page models in schema.prisma."
Instruction: "Add draftSettings String? @map(\"draft_settings\") to Theme, and draftContent String? @map(\"draft_content\") to Page in schema.prisma"
ReplacementContent:
"// 15. THEME  (visual stylesheet vars)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model Theme {
  id            String   @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId      String?  @map("tenant_id") // null = global platform system theme
  name          String
  settings      String   @default("{}") // JSON string of custom color palettes and fonts
  draftSettings String?  @map("draft_settings")
  isCustom      Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_custom")
  createdAt     DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant Tenant? @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  websites Website[]

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@map("themes")
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// 16. WEBSITE
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
model Website {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  tenantId    String   @map("tenant_id")
  themeId     String   @map("theme_id")
  title       String
  description String?
  domain      String?  @unique // custom domain lookup
  isActive    Boolean  @default(true) @map("is_active")
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("created_at")
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt @map("updated_at")

  tenant Tenant @relation(fields: [tenantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  theme  Theme  @relation(fields: [themeId], references: [id], onDelete: Restrict)

  pages           Page[]
  navigationMenus NavigationMenu[]
  cmsFooters      CmsFooter[]

  @@index([tenantId])
  @@index([themeId])
  @@map("websites")
}
